headline: BOK Financial Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates as NII & Fee Income Rise Y/Y
summary: BOKF beats Q2 earnings estimates as higher NII, fee income and loan growth lift the results, while rising expenses remain a key headwind.

raw.headline: BOK Financial Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates as NII & Fee Income Rise Y/Y
raw.summary: BOKF beats Q2 earnings estimates as higher NII, fee income and loan growth lift the results, while rising expenses remain a key headwind.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $268
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Brian Foran   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Hold and raises the price target from $230 to $268.
